subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God and daughter of His maidservant! Though that bird of the garden of love hath winged its flight to the eternal paradise and to the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله و ابنه امته اگرچه آن طیر حدیقه محبت بگلشن باقی شتافت و بگلزار
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
